product.name: Tension Curtain Rod, 51-165 Inch,Spring Shower Closet for Windows or Shower,Easy to Install, No Drilling, Rust, Bathroom, Rod Diameter 1.26 Inches, Black,Umimile
features: 【Easy to Install】The adjustable shower curtain rod is available from 51 to 165 Inches. It only needs to adjust the length through the adjustment button, so you can quickly and easily install the tension rod without drilling, screws or any tools.

【Never Rust & Constant Tension】Shower curtain rod offers rust and corrosion resistance .In addition,there's no slipping with this tension rod and it's gentle on walls. It offers a long-lasting, sturdy hold and a max load of up to 66 lbs.

【Apply For All Surface】This tension rod can be applied on all surfaces include both of smooth and rough surface like wallpaper, paint wall, tile wall, wooden frame, Etc. Rubber plate will not scratch or damage the installation surface.

【Multi Purpose】The shower tension rod can used in other areas of the home,such as bathroom,bedroom ,kitchen,balcony.Use it to hang privacy curtains in a doorway or blackout curtains in a bedroom window.

【Included Product Accessories】One spring rod, one additional short rod（about 23 inches), two additional long rods（about 42.5 inches), two trimming nuts and two end caps. The diameter of the rod is about 1.26 inches. The diameter of the end cap is about 2.95 inches.
